title: Chicken Bucket
description: This resourcepack replaces the cooked_chicken texture with a chicken bucket, which is pretty cool in my opinion.
body:
This WAS my first time making a resource pack! Please be indulgent.
## ❔What does this resource pack do?

This resource packs replaces the cooked chicken texture for a more funny one, a chicken bucket! :)

This may be Cool for a funny touch in gameplay; or just for a better texture!

## ✅Features

Replaces the cooked_chicken texture, with a cool funny texture; A chicken bucket!
